# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
    apiVersion: 2020-06-01
    name: "[concat(parameters('virtualNetworkName'), '/', parameters('subnetName'))]"
    properties:
      addressPrefix: "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]"
      serviceEndpoints:
        - service: "Microsoft.Storage"
          locations: 
            - "[resourceGroup().location]"
        - service: "Microsoft.Sql"
          locations: 
            - "[resourceGroup().location]"

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      networkAcls:
        bypass: "Logging,Metrics,AzureServices"
        defaultAction: "Deny"
        virtualNetworkRules:
          - id: "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('virtualNetworkName'), parameters('subnetName')))]"
            action: "Allow"
        ipRules:
          - "[parameters('publicIPRule')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2017-10-01-preview
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2017-10-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', 'AllowAzureServicesAndResources')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2017-10-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', 'PublicAccess')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('publicIPRule')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('publicIPRule')]"

parameters:
  virtualNetworkName:
    type: string
  subnetName:
    type: string
  subnetAddressPrefix:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
  publicIPRule:
    type: string
